title: task
description: secure.rs:237-242 - decrypt_response calls ctx.unprotect_request() to decrypt OSCORE responses. The unprotect_request function in lichen-oscore/lib.rs:362-364 requires opt.piv_len > 0, but per RFC 8613 Section 5.4, OSCORE responses MAY omit the PIV (piv_len=0) when echoing the request's PIV. This causes responses that use echo mode to fail with DecryptFailed. Failure scenario: Server sends OSCORE response without PIV in option (echo mode), client fails to decrypt valid response.
close_reason: Already fixed: decrypt_response correctly uses ctx.unprotect_response() which handles PIV-less responses per RFC 8613 Section 5.4. The unprotect_response function falls back to request_piv when response omits PIV.
